name: Vitamin C Glow Face Wash
short: A brightening Vitamin C face wash with black turmeric, lemon extract, and niacinamide for an even, radiant tone.
description: Vitamin C Glow is a brightening daily face wash that pairs Vitamin C with black turmeric (kaempferia galanga) — an Ayurvedic botanical long valued for its clarifying properties. Lemon extract boosts radiance, while niacinamide helps even tone and fade the look of dark spots over time. The sulfate-free, paraben-free formula is gentle enough for daily use on all skin types. Skin looks brighter, fresher, and more luminous with every cleanse.
benefits: Brightens with Vitamin C and lemon extract
Black turmeric clarifies — an Ayurvedic-inspired ingredient
Niacinamide helps even tone and fade dark spots
usage: Massage a pea-sized amount onto damp skin in circular motions for 30 seconds. Rinse thoroughly with lukewarm water. Use morning and evening. For best results, follow with a Vitamin C serum and SPF during the day.
